p.em: Technical Specification for Raft Implementation Verification

div.p: Duration: "10m0s" Total wall-clock execution time of the test suite.
CommandsSubmitted: 10000 Total client requests attempted against the cluster.
CommandsCommitted: 9850 Requests that reached a quorum and were indexed.
CommandsApplied: 9850 State machine transitions executed locally.
LeaderChanges: 15 Count of Term increments resulting in new leaders.
PartitionsInjected: 8 Partial or total network partitions created by nemesis.
KillsInjected: 25 SIGKILL events triggered against Raft nodes.
RestartsInjected: 25 Nodes successfully recovered from storage snapshots.
InvariantViolations: 0 Critical failures (e.g., Election Safety, Log Matching).
CommitLatencyP50: 85ms Median time from submission to commit.
CommitLatencyP99: 195ms Tail latency during high contention/partitions.
